meta.title: IST Auto — Used cars in Cluj-Napoca, 12-month warranty
meta.description: IST Auto, a used-car dealership in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. 12-month warranty with no km limit, ID-only financing, temporary plates, nationwide delivery.
meta.og_title: IST Auto — Used cars in Cluj-Napoca

hero.title: IST Auto
hero.lede: ID-only financing. Temporary plates included. We deliver anywhere in Romania.

about.heading: About IST Auto
about.p1: IST Auto is a used-car dealership in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Every car comes with a 12-month warranty with no km limit, ID-only financing, and nationwide delivery.
about.p2: Each car is inspected before it reaches you. No surprises, no hidden clauses — a straightforward experience built on trust.

sales.title: Used-car sales
sales.desc: A rotating stock of inspected, road-ready cars.

warranty.title: 12-month warranty, no km limit
warranty.desc: Every car we sell comes with a 12-month warranty — no mileage cap.

installments.title: ID-only financing
installments.desc: Fast financing with just your ID. No proof of income needed.

plates.title: Temporary plates
plates.desc: We handle the temporary registration so you can drive off the lot.

delivery.title: Nationwide delivery
delivery.desc: We deliver anywhere in Romania — the car comes to your door.

listings.heading: Available cars
listings.noscript: Enable JavaScript or visit our listings on OLX.

fallback.heading: See all our cars on OLX
fallback.lede: Active listings live on OLX. Open the full list in a new tab.

footer.inventory_note: Car inventory is maintained on OLX.

whatsapp.prefilled_message: Hi, I found IST Auto's site and I'd like more info about your cars.
